_comment: Black Arrow strategy config. Edit freely — no code changes needed. Ratios are strategic starting points, not quotas; the Brain balances toward them among ELIGIBLE categories and redistributes away from unavailable ones.
_company_pages_note: Pages the Brain reads as source-of-truth each run. Add any page with offers/tools/lead magnets so they get featured and monitored automatically.

optimization._comment: Blend base ratios toward measured per-category performance. weight caps how far the mix can drift per cycle; min_samples avoids acting on noise.

experiments._comment: One experiment runs at a time. The Brain assigns a variant per post, tags it, and concludes when each option has min_samples posts. Small samples -> treated as a lean, not proof. Experiments auto-pause during cold start (no audience) and auto-resume once min_history posts and min_total_engagement are reached.

variables.name: hook_style
variables.hypothesis: Question-led hooks earn more comments than statement-led hooks.

instructions.question: Open with a sharp question the owner is already asking themselves.
instructions.statement: Open with a bold, specific statement of fact or outcome.

variables.name: cta_style
variables.hypothesis: A specific keyword DM CTA drives more DMs than a soft 'DM us'.

instructions.keyword: End with the standard DM keyword for the post's intent (TOOLS, TRIAL, or SCALE).
instructions.soft: End with a softer, conversational invitation to DM (still route to TOOLS, TRIAL, or SCALE if a keyword is used).

variables.name: opening_frame
variables.hypothesis: Problem-first framing earns more saves than outcome-first.

instructions.problem_first: Lead with the painful problem the owner feels right now.
instructions.outcome_first: Lead with the desirable outcome they want.

repurposing._comment: Occasionally rebuild a proven past angle into a fresh derivative in a new format. Auto-paused until there's audience data.

funnel_stages._comment: Maps categories to audience-journey stages, for nurture balance and reporting.

research._comment: Sources the news/research pass should prioritize, and the niche keywords that define relevance. Editable.

authority_frameworks.label: Authority / Frameworks
authority_frameworks.guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
authority_frameworks.evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.

education_informative.label: Education / Informative
education_informative.guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
education_informative.evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.

demonstrations_walkthroughs.label: Demonstrations / System Walkthroughs
demonstrations_walkthroughs.guidance: Show, in a clearly-labeled illustrative way, how a Black Arrow system works (e.g. an automated lead follow-up sequence, missed-call text-back, review request flow).
demonstrations_walkthroughs.evidence_note: Label as an example/demonstration. NEVER imply it is a specific client's live account or claim a performance result.

news_industry.label: News / Industry Intelligence
news_industry.guidance: Interpret a genuinely recent, relevant marketing/software development for service-business owners: what it means and what they should do. Be the interpreter, not a reposter.
news_industry.evidence_note: Only if current and verifiable from your research. Cite the source. Distinguish fact from interpretation.

third_party_research.label: Third-Party Research / Market Evidence
third_party_research.guidance: Use a credible external study to explain why a capability matters. Qualified language: 'Research suggests...', 'The study found...'.
third_party_research.evidence_note: Attribute the source. NEVER imply Black Arrow produced the result or achieves the same without evidence.

contrarian_pov.label: Contrarian / Brand Point of View
contrarian_pov.guidance: State a sharp, defensible point of view or contrarian take on how service businesses actually grow. Confident, specific, never gimmicky engagement-bait.
contrarian_pov.evidence_note: Framed clearly as Black Arrow's view; no fabricated proof.

offers_lead_magnets.label: Offers / Lead Magnets
offers_lead_magnets.guidance: Feature ONE specific free tool actually published at blackarrow.ltd/tools (a calculator, an audit, an AI builder, or Black Arrow OS — the free pocket CRM). Everything on that page is free value used as a lead magnet. Lead with what the tool tells or gives the owner, cite its stated value where the site shows one, and end with the TOOLS keyword CTA. Rotate through the tools; never feature the same one twice in a row.
offers_lead_magnets.evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.

platform_promo.label: Platform / Free Trial Promo
platform_promo.guidance: Promote the Black Arrow platform (blackarrow.ltd/app) through its real offers: the 14-day full-access free trial (no card needed, cancel anytime) and the referral deal (refer a business, when they subscribe you both get a free month, tracked automatically). Angle it around a real pain the platform kills (tool sprawl, missed calls, slow follow-up, no revenue reporting). Lead with value, end with the TRIAL keyword CTA. Never invent features or plan pricing; point plan questions to the site.
platform_promo.evidence_note: Only features and offers actually published on blackarrow.ltd/app. No invented pricing or results.

objection_nurture.label: Objection Handling / Audience Nurture
objection_nurture.guidance: Honestly handle a common objection or hesitation an owner has about automation/marketing (cost, complexity, 'it feels impersonal'). Build trust. For done-for-you cost objections: never give numbers; the honest answer is that pricing follows a diagnosis meeting.
objection_nurture.evidence_note: Transparent and honest; no unsupported guarantees, no done-for-you pricing.

verified_proof.label: Verified Proof / Case Studies
verified_proof.unavailable_reason: No approved case-study or client-result records exist yet. Enable when verified first-party evidence is added.
verified_proof.guidance: Do not create. No fabricated results, metrics, testimonials, or client names.

personal_founder.label: Personal / Founder
personal_founder.unavailable_reason: No approved founder information exists yet. Enable when a Founder Knowledge Profile is added.
personal_founder.guidance: Do not create. No invented founder stories, quotes, or first-person claims.
